│ build 2>&1 | head -30
  └ 30 lines...

● Edit TilesWidget.jsx +2 -2
  └ packages/react/src/canvas/widgets/TilesWidget.jsx

● Rebuild (shell)
  │ cd /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/.worktrees/4.3.0--prompt-widget && npm run
  │ build 2>&1 | tail -5
  └ 6 lines...

● Build passes. Here's what changed:

  Widget (TilesWidget.jsx):

   - Detects isProd via !onUpdate — no canvas editing in production
   - Prod state: loads from / saves to localStorage (storyboard-tiles-{widgetId})
   - Inline toolbar renders in prod with randomize 🔀, column ±, row ±, and a 3×3 label
   - Keyboard shortcuts work without interact gate in prod (always active)

  WidgetChrome: Interact gate overlay now skips in readOnly mode so it doesn't block
  prod interactions.

  CSS: Added .toolbar, .toolbarBtn, .toolbarLabel, .toolbarSep styles for the inline
  prod controls.
